name: Exclusion for Foreign-Targeted Obligations

eligibility.description: Obligations must have arrangements ensuring sale only to non-U.S. persons, pay interest outside the U.S., and include specific tax limitation statements on the face of the obligation.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Issuers can avoid the 1% excise tax on non-registered obligations by structuring debt to be sold only to non-U.S. persons with interest payable outside the U.S.
